candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label from candidate list; appropriate single reported revenue line.

No clear cost of goods sold / cost of sales line is present on the provided Income Statement. 'Other external costs' appears to be a broader operating expense bucket rather than direct COGS.

candidates.why: Operating overhead-type expense bucket and not a total/subtotal.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. No explicit SG&A line exists. Chose the best overhead component rows from the candidate list. Excluded depreciation/amortization, totals, balancing rows, and the supplemental R&D row to avoid inappropriate inclusion in SG&A.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense label; although supplemental/below EBIT, it is still the clearest dedicated R&D line.

variables.notes: Mapped to the explicit dedicated R&D line. It appears as a supplemental disclosure below operating result, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense component; preferred over broader financial costs.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used the most granular recurring interest expense components and excluded broader 'Financial costs' to avoid possible inclusion of FX/non-interest items and double counting.

candidates.why: Only clear equity line available; acceptable when no parent-only equity line exists.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners' equity line is shown. Per rule, used 'Total equity' and set MIB to empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Correct concept label for minority/non-controlling interests, but no values shown and total equity was used for BE.
Correct concept label for minority interest, but no values shown and total equity was used for BE.

variables.notes: Used empty mapping because no distinct populated non-controlling interest line is evident, and BE is mapped to 'Total equity' which would already include any minority interest if present.
